title: OREGON HOPELINE - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON HOPELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a hotline that shares information on substance use disorders, Measure 110, and peer support. Connects callers to community resources for harm reduction, treatment, and recovery. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 975-0505 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (833) 975-0505 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or assistance FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues Substance Use Disorder Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES -
